---
title: "Risk Assessment Matrix"
subtitle: "Low Risk"
---

| Risk | Likelihood | Consequence | Level | Mitigation |
|------|-----------|-------------|-------|------------|
| Mild performance anxiety | Possible | Minor | Low | Voluntary, non-assessed; option to pause/withdraw; supportive facilitation |
| Privacy breach | Rare | Moderate | Low | No PII; session codes only; secure storage; minimal dataset |
| Perceived coercion | Possible | Minor | Low | Clear messaging; alternative activity; consent outside assessment context |
| Distress due to AI errors | Rare | Minor | Low | Facilitator support; debrief; ability to stop |
